info.name: AI Accounts Review API
info.description: Complete API testing collection for AI Accounts Review system

request.description:
Upload accounting files and generate comprehensive review with findings.

Required:
- accountsFile (PDF/XLSX/TXT)
- trialBalanceFile (XLSX)
- partnerId (1-7)

Optional:
- scope (full, tax, commercial)

Save completed review to MongoDB database.

Required fields:
- reviewId
- partnerId

Optional but recommended:
- partnerName
- timestamp
- scope
- status
- errorCount
- warningCount
- errors array
- queries array

Generate HTML for PDF export (Legacy endpoint).

Required:
- results object with partner and findings data

Generate browser-printable HTML report for PDF export (Legacy).

Returns HTML content with Content-Type: text/html
